title: Different digits
description: Senya likes integers not containing two consecutive equal digits. You are given an integer $n$. Help Senya to find the smallest integer he likes, which is strictly greater than $n$.
output: Print the smallest integer strictly greater than $n$, which doesn't contain any two consecutive equal digits.
source: Olympiad, Russian Olympiad in Informatics, Russia High School Programming Contest, Russia High School Programming Contest 2017
